parameters.jsCode:
const body = $input.first().json.body || $input.first().json;
const eventType = body._event_type || (body.new_status === 'new' ? 'new_lead' : 'status_change');

const stageToStatus = {
  'new_lead': 'new',
  'contacted': 'in_progress',
  'no_answer': 'follow_up',
  'qualifying': 'in_progress',
  'qualified': 'in_progress',
  'proposal_sent': 'closing_process',
  'follow_up': 'follow_up',
  'awaiting_docs': 'closing_process',
  'converted': 'completed',
  'not_interested': 'not_interested',
  'disqualified': 'not_interested',
  'duplicate': 'skip',
  'spam': 'skip'
};

return [{
  json: {
    name: body.name,
    phone: body.phone,
    email: body.email || '',
    category: body.category || 'osek_patur',
    source_page: body.source_page || '',
    new_status: stageToStatus[body.new_status] || body.new_status,
    previous_status: body.previous_status || '',
    pipeline_stage: body.new_status,
    not_interested_reason: body.not_interested_reason || '',
    not_interested_category: body.not_interested_category || '',
    had_conversation: body.had_conversation || false,
    agent_name: body.agent_name || '',
    notes: body.notes || '',
    lead_id: body.lead_id || '',
    page_intent: body.page_intent || '',
    service_type: body.service_type || body.category || '',
    _event_type: eventType
  }
}];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ page_intent: $json.page_intent || "guide", flow_type: $json.flow_type || "generic_flow", bot_started_at: new Date().toISOString(), bot_current_step: "opening_sent", bot_messages_count: 1, bot_last_message_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ phone: $("Build Dynamic Bot Message").first().json.phone, flow_type: $("Build Dynamic Bot Message").first().json.flow_type || "generic_flow", page_intent: $("Build Dynamic Bot Message").first().json.page_intent || "guide", page_slug: $("Build Dynamic Bot Message").first().json.source_page || "", current_step: "opening_sent", temperature: "warm" }) }}
